name: Golioth
description: Golioth — IoT cloud platform providing OTA firmware updates, time-series logging, and device shadow over CoAP/MQTT.

seo.title: Golioth — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Golioth: Golioth — IoT cloud platform providing OTA firmware updates, time-series logging, and device shadow over CoAP/MQTT.

when_to_use: OTA firmware updates over CoAP/MQTT to embedded devices
Time-series sensor logging from IoT devices to cloud
Device shadow and remote configuration for field devices
Zephyr RTOS integration for connected product development
Cloud-managed IoT platform for hardware startups

pros: CoAP and MQTT support out of the box
cons: Ecosystem smaller than AWS or Azure IoT
Pricing tier limits at the low end
review.verdict: A developer-centric IoT cloud especially strong for Zephyr and constrained devices.
review.best_for: Firmware teams shipping constrained Zephyr-based IoT devices
review.not_for: Cloud-first teams without embedded Linux or RTOS chops

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
